name: promptbits
title: PromptBits
description: Access your PromptBits prompt templates and paste them into any application
author: ericpaul

commands.name: paste-prompt
commands.title: Search Prompts
commands.description: Browse and paste prompts from your PromptBits library

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your PromptBits API key from promptbits.dev

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
